subcodes.first_line: O ye wayfarers in the wilderness of separation and forgetfulness, and ye strangers in the desert of abasement and silence, in the land of exile and remoteness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سفرای صحرای فرقت و فراموشی و غربای بیدای ذلت و خاموشی در دیار غربت و نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @thankfulness; gratitude, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
